property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
19:48:19.603 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.fiap_g14.foodlink.api.FoodlinkApiApplicationTests]: FoodlinkApiApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:48:19.708 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.fiap_g14.foodlink.api.FoodlinkApiApplication for test class com.fiap_g14.foodlink.api.FoodlinkApiApplicationTests 19:48:19.812 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.fiap_g14.foodlink.api.FoodlinkApiApplicationTests]: FoodlinkApiApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:48:19.814 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.fiap_g14.foodlink.api.FoodlinkApiApplication for test class com.fiap_g14.foodlink.api.FoodlinkApiApplicationTests
